calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Elizabeth Hanowsky for Angelo Guidi (Petitioner).

Counsel addressed the Bank of America creditor's claim, the issue of fees and the issue of Mr. Guidi paying any portion of fees not paid by the Court. The accounting petition was taken under submission. Mr. Conrad presented a revised order omitting the "omnibus" clause.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Continued To Dec-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Continued To Mar-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Angelo Guidi (Administrator).

Mr. Conrad stated that Bank of America said okay to the proposed action to distibute the property, that they then changed their mind, then said okay again and then they lost the file. In addition, Mr. Conrad stated that he will be filing a Petition for Final Distribution within 30-days. Status on close of the Estate was continued to October 17, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-21-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad for Angelo Guidi.

Mr. Conrad stated that the house has no equity, that it is underwater, that the Sister who disclaimed has no issue and that the only Heirs are the two Brothers. In addition, Mr. Conrad stated that the Parties were unsuccessful in obtaining a loan, that his Client is probably going to distribute the asset/home to his Brothers in Law and that he can have the Brothers in Law sign consents to extend administration of the Estate. Status of close of the Estate was continued to September 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status and for notice under Probate Code 12201.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Continued To Mar-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
